user.title: Metlink Explorer Setup
user.description: Enter your Metlink API key to get started. You can get your API key from https://api.metlink.org.nz/

transport_type.title: Select Transport Type
transport_type.description: Choose the type of transport you want to monitor. Available transport types: {transport_types}

route_selection.title: Select Route
route_selection.description: Choose the specific route you want to monitor for {transport_type}. Found {route_count} routes.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Metlink API
error.no_routes: No routes found for the selected transport type

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Metlink API
abort.no_routes: No routes found for the selected transport type

init.title: Metlink Explorer Options
init.description: Configure options for this Metlink Explorer integration.
